# Psalms 41

## Verses (13)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Happy is the man who gives thought to the poor; the Lord will be his saviour in the time of trouble. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | The Lord will keep him safe, and give him life; the Lord will let him be a blessing on the earth, and will not give him into the hand of his haters. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | The Lord will be his support on his bed of pain: by you will all his grief be turned to strength. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | I said, Lord, have mercy on me; make my soul well, because my faith is in you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | My haters say evil against me, When will he be dead, and his name come to an end? | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | If one comes to see me, deceit is in his heart; he keeps a store of evil, which he makes public in every place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | All my haters are talking secretly together against me; they are designing my downfall. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | They say, He has an evil disease, which will not let him go: and now that he is down he will not get up again. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Even my dearest friend, in whom I had faith, who took bread with me, is turned against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | But you, O Lord, have mercy on me, lifting me up, so that I may give them their punishment. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | By this I see that you have pleasure in me, because my hater does not overcome me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | And as for me, you are my support in my righteousness, giving me a place before your face for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | May the Lord God of Israel be praised, through eternal days and for ever. So be it. So be it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |

<!-- END AUTO-INDEX -->
